farm_platform.title: Build an Enderman XP farm — construct a Y=128+ kill platform on the main End island for mass Enderman spawning

subtitle.text: Endermen are the most renewable resource in the End. Build the farm and the pearls never run out.

description: CH.13 · THE PEARL FARM
▸ Ender Pearls are the currency of the End.
Every teleport costs one.
Eye of Ender requires one.
Void mobility is built on pearls.
The main End island has the highest Enderman density
in the game. Build the farm here, not in the Overworld.
◈ ENDERMAN FARM DESIGN
└ Platform height: Y=128+ (above natural island elevation)
└ Platform size: 30×30 minimum — larger = more spawns
└ Material: any solid block (End Stone is on-theme and free)
└ Endermite bait: trap an Endermite in a minecart
(Endermen target Endermites — funnel them into kill zone)
└ Kill zone: 3-block fall drop + player AFK spot
OR: water elevator down to ground kill platform
└ XP rate: some of the best XP per hour in the game
◈ ENDERMAN OVERHAUL VARIANTS IN END
└ Enderman Overhaul variants spawn in End based on biome
└ End-specific variants may have different pearl drop rates
└ Magical Enderman: rare variant, anomalous drop behavior
Do not build the farm specifically around it
└ All variants count toward pearl collection
◈ PEARL USES IN CH13+
└ Ender Chest: 8 Obsidian + 1 Eye of Ender (= pearl + blaze)
└ Throwing pearls: void escape if falling, End City traversal
└ Ch14: Echo Shard recipes may require pearls as ingredient
└ Quantum Fluid prep: Chorus + Water, but pearls fuel portal hops
└ End Crystal respawn: 4 per re-summon (not pearl-based)
▸ Every civilization that reached the End built a pearl farm.
It is one of the first things they did after clearing the dragon.
The farm on the main island is how you know someone was here.
The platform at Y=128. The trapdoors. The kill zone.
They all built the same design.
You will too.
▶ Build a Y=128+ Enderman farm platform [check]
▶ Farm 64 Ender Pearls
◇ Endermite bait trick: throw a pearl to spawn Endermite,
immediately trap it in a minecart before it despawns.
(Endermites despawn after 2 minutes unless named.)
Name tag the Endermite to prevent despawn.
The farm works passively once built.
